content.title: v2.0.0 — March 2025
content.summary: Major architectural overhaul. New API v2, redesigned workspace model with RBAC, signed webhook payloads. v1 API deprecated.

content.title: v1.9.0 — March 2025
content.summary: Improved dashboard performance by 40%, new CSV export, fixed timezone handling.

content.title: v1.8.0 — January 2025
content.summary: Kanban board view, Slack/Jira/GitHub integrations, dark mode support.
